ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city or region) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, mountainous) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station associated with this location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement associated with this date */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* The actual date of the measurement */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the measurement location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "atmos_pressure" REAL /* Mean atmospheric pressure measured (in hPa) */,
  "temp_mean" REAL /* Mean temperature (in °C) */,
  "rh_mean" REAL /* Mean relative humidity (as a percentage) */,
  "vapor_pressure_mean" REAL /* Mean vapor pressure (in hPa) */,
  "wspd_arith_mean" REAL /* Mean wind speed (in m/s) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Mean wind direction (in degrees) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation (in mm) */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Total solar radiation (in W/m²) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the measurement */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES measurement_dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the accessed data */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of data access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement being validated (e.g., temp, humidity) */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., range check, threshold check) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being validated */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation rule applied */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_results_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("measurement_id")
)
